_comment: Homepage — dynamic_zone relations (testimonials, faqs, plans) sẽ được inject tự động bởi seeder sau khi seed xong các collection type.

seo.metaTitle: LaunchPad — Modern SaaS for Growing Teams
seo.metaDescription: LaunchPad helps businesses scale faster with analytics, marketing automation, and design tools. Start your free trial today.

dynamic_zone.heading: Build faster. Scale smarter.
dynamic_zone.sub_heading: The all-in-one platform that empowers your team with analytics, automation, and design tools to drive real growth.

dynamic_zone.heading: Everything you need to grow
dynamic_zone.sub_heading: Powerful features designed for modern teams.

globe_card.title: Global Analytics
globe_card.description: Track your metrics across regions and time zones with real-time dashboards.

ray_card.title: Lightning Fast
ray_card.description: Sub-100ms response times with edge-optimized infrastructure.

graph_card.title: Growth Metrics
graph_card.description: Visualize your growth with beautiful, interactive charts and reports.

social_media_card.Title: Integrations
social_media_card.Description: Connect with the tools your team already loves.

dynamic_zone.heading: Get started in 3 easy steps
dynamic_zone.sub_heading: From sign-up to insights in under 5 minutes.

steps.title: Create your account
steps.description: Sign up for free in seconds. No credit card required.

steps.title: Connect your data
steps.description: Integrate your existing tools with our one-click connectors or REST API.

steps.title: Get actionable insights
steps.description: Start seeing real-time analytics and automated reports immediately.

dynamic_zone.heading: Simple, transparent pricing
dynamic_zone.sub_heading: No hidden fees. No surprises. Pick the plan that fits your team.

dynamic_zone.heading: Loved by teams worldwide

dynamic_zone.sub_heading: Can't find the answer you're looking for? Reach out to our support team.
